mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.post_id AS postId, c.author_id AS authorId, COALESCE(NULLIF(u.nickname, ''), NULLIF(u.username, ''), '社区成员') AS authorName, u.avatar AS authorAvatar, c.content, c.create_time AS createTime FROM community_comment c LEFT JOIN user_account u ON u.id = c.author_id WHERE c.post_id = #{postId} AND c.status = 1 ORDER BY c.id ASC
